text:
It looks that after petting the port I get in poudrere waring which didn't appear before:
[00:00:31] Warning: (net-mgmt/ipfixcol2): Error: net-mgmt/ipfixcol2 has dependency on textproc/py-docutils with invalid empty FLAVOR; Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
